extraction.one_line_summary: POLANC Jan attacked on Mount Etna with 4.1km to go, headwind neutering responses, took stage and moved into pink.
tactical_patterns: Headwind on Etna finish negated power advantages, making sustained gaps nearly impossible even for riders feeling strong.
GAVARIA Fernando sprinting intermediate points signals aggressive points classification ambition across three weeks, not just sprint stages.
Van Rensburg-Poljanski breakaway fractured due to interpersonal tension, compromising cooperation when teamwork was essential.

rider_signals.POLANC Jan: positive: Took biggest career win on Etna, timing attack precisely at 4.1km knowing headwind would prevent catches.
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: negative: Crashed twice during stage, lost 19 seconds to Polanc, showing early Giro vulnerability and poor positioning.
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: Moved into maglia rosa through consistent positioning, 6 seconds ahead of Thomas despite no stage heroics.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Present in final group but no acceleration response to Polanc, sitting 6 seconds behind Jungels overall.
